'''B-1D4''', otherwise known as '''Beewondeefor''', or her codename, '''The Heart of Steel''', was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Droid/Legends|droid]] purchased by [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]]. Unbeknownst to them at first, Wondeefor was actually an extremely powerful Imperial weapon devised by [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[4-8C]]. She had the ability to "seduce" any droid in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], and override their programming, allowing them to do her bidding.

{{Droid-stub}}
